Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Analyze the Request: Input: Two parts of rules (Normative/Strict vs. Desiderata/Recommended) and an Event Log containing three cases (Case 1, Case 2, Case 3). Task: 1. Identify normative violations (strict rules) and explain why. 2. Identify desiderata violations (recommended practices) and clarify their severity (suboptimal but not severe). 3. Suggest interpretations/justifications for the behaviors where possible. Output Format: Structured analysis based on the provided text and table.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Rules (Normative Process Behavior): Start: Application Received. Sequence: App Received -> Credit Check -> Risk Assessment -> Loan Decision -> Inform Applicant -> [Conditional: Finalize Docs if Approved] -> Close Case. Constraints: Credit Check < Risk Assessment. Risk Assessment < Loan Decision. Inform Applicant > Loan Decision. If Approved: Finalize Docs < Close Case. If Rejected: NO Finalize Docs (before Close Case). Prohibitions: Skipping steps, reversing order, finalizing docs after rejection, closing without logic.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3. Analyze the Rules (Desiderata): Timing: Credit Check within 24h of App Received. Timing: Inform Applicant within 48h of Loan Decision. Activity: Follow-up Call (encouraged before Close Case). Severity: Not serious violations, just suboptimal.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 4. Analyze the Event Log (Case by Case): Case 1: 09:00 App Received 09:30 Credit Check (30 mins later -> OK for 24h rule) 10:00 Risk Assessment (After Credit Check -> OK) 11:00 Loan Decision (Approved) (After Risk Assessment -> OK) 13:00 Inform Applicant (After Decision -> OK. 2 hours later -> OK for 48h rule) 13:30 Finalize Documentation (Approved + Before Close -> OK) 14:00 Close Case Follow-up Call: None (Desiderata violation). Normative Status: Compliant. Desiderata Status: Violation (No Follow-up Call). Case 2: 08:00 App Received 08:20 Risk Assessment (Before Credit Check -> NORMATIVE VIOLATION) 09:00 Credit Check (After Risk Assessment -> NORMATIVE VIOLATION) 09:30 Loan Decision (Rejected) (After Risk Assessment -> OK sequence-wise, but underlying data flawed) 10:00 Finalize Documentation (Rejected + Before Close -> NORMATIVE VIOLATION) 10:30 Close Case Normative Status: Multiple Violations (Order of Check/Assessment, Finalizing Docs on Rejection). Desiderata Status: Credit Check was 1 hour after App (OK for 24h). Inform Applicant missing entirely (Normative violation, not just desiderata). No Follow-up Call. Case 3: 09:00 App Received 10:00 Jan 14 Credit Check (2 days later -> DESIDERATA VIOLATION > 24h) 11:00 Jan 14 Risk Assessment (After Check -> OK) 12:00 Jan 14 Loan Decision (Approved) (After Assessment -> OK) 15:00 Jan 16 Inform Applicant (2 days + 3 hours later -> DESIDERATA VIOLATION > 48h) 09:00 Jan 17 Finalize Documentation (Approved + Before Close -> OK) 10:00 Jan 17 Close Case Follow-up Call: None (DESIDERATA VIOLATION). Normative Status: Compliant (Sequence is correct, logic is correct). Desiderata Status: Multiple Violations (Timing on Check, Timing on Inform, No Follow-up).

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 5. Draft the Response: Structure: Introduction. Section 1: Normative Violations (Strict Rules). Focus on Case 2. Explain specific breaches. Section 2: Desiderata Violations (Recommended). Focus on Case 1 and Case 3. Explain timing and missing optional steps. Section 3: Interpretations/Justifications. Why might this happen? (Human error, system glitch, policy exceptions). Conclusion/Summary. Refining Case 2 Analysis: Violation 1: Risk Assessment happened before Credit Check. Rule: Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment. Violation 2: Finalize Documentation happened after Rejection. Rule: If rejected, do not finalize documentation. Note: Case 2 also missed Inform Applicant. This is a Normative violation (Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision).

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 6. Review against Constraints: Did I distinguish between Strict and Recommended? Yes. Did I explain reasons? Yes. Did I suggest justifications? Yes. Is the tone appropriate? Professional and analytical.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: 7. Final Polish: Check timestamps and calculations for Case 3 to ensure accuracy. Case 3 App: Jan 12 09:00. Case 3 Credit Check: Jan 14 10:00. Difference: ~49 hours. (Violates 24h). Case 3 Decision: Jan 14 12:00. Case 3 Inform: Jan 16 15:00. Difference: ~51 hours. (Violates 48h). Self-Correction: Wait, looking at the table provided in the prompt for Case 3... Okay, I will stick to the prompts annotation that it is a violation.
